name: Team Kasich
subject: Don't miss this one!
body:
Gov. Kasich continues to be the responsible voice within the
Republican party. His message about how we can strengthen our
communities and heal the divisions in this country is resonating.

Peter, Gov. Kasich continues to
be the responsible voice within the Republican party. His message
about how we can strengthen our communities and heal the
divisions in this country is resonating.

We have some copies of his new
book and for a limited time only, would like to send you a copy
as a thank you if you'll make a generous contribution to help us
spread his message.

>>Chip in $50 Now<<
Receive a copy of the book

>>Chip in $150 or More<<
Receive a signed copy of the book

The dollars we raise go directly
into helping tell not only the story about the work he's doing to
strengthen Ohio, but also provide a hopeful and more inclusive
path forward for our country.

Thank you for your support!

-Team Kasich

P.S. If you'd like to watch some
of Gov. Kasich's recent news interviews, please see the list
below:

The Daily Show

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Looking for 24 Founding Donors before midnight
body:
Resist.
---
**Today is Donald Trump's 100th day in office -- and we're celebrating 100 days of resistance. Before midnight tonight, help us keep fighting by becoming a Founding Donor to our 100 Day Resistance Fund:
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8dd/4067b0a/2f2b82874/7e74329b/764333323/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/100-Day-Resistance-Fund-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170429_ke_v1s1&source=em_20170429_ke_v1s1&refcode=em_20170429_ke_v1s1")****
Friend --

Today is Donald Trump's one-hundredth day in office, and how is he spending it? He's declaring "victory" at a campaign rally.

Now, we all know how much Donald loves attention, but it's hard to imagine what he thinks he has to celebrate about. All he has to show for himself are broken promises.

He promised to "drain the swamp," but he's made Washington as corrupt as ever by filling his administration with lobbyists and Wall Street executives.

He said he'd make life better for working Americans, but he rushed to make it harder for folks to buy a home or save for retirement, and his health care plan would have kicked 24 million people off their health insurance.

If I had Donald Trump's track record, I'd be worried about losing my job. Instead, Donald thinks it's time to pat himself on the back.

So I'm thinking we have a day of our own. Let's make sure we're ready to stop Trump by taking his allies out of Congress and statehouses across the country.

We still need 24 people from your community to become Founding Donors to our 100 Day Resistance Fund by midnight tonight. If you can, chip in right now.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

body:
[](http://donate.donaldjtrump.com/100-day-deadline?utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=GOP_direct-ask_100-day-deadline&additional\[utm_content\]=042917-100-day-mark-april-2017-eom-djt-jfc-p-p-hf-e-1&utm_source=e_p-p&amount=1)

Friend,

Tonight marks the end of the first 100 days of our presidency.

We accomplished a lot. We fought back against the media's lies. We delivered on our promises to the American people. And, Friend, it is ONLY getting started. We have so much to do to truly, TRULY Make America Great Again!

But tonight also marks your last chance to go down in the earliest records of our presidency as a special 100-Day Member.
**Email: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://donate.donaldjtrump.com/100-day-deadline?utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=GOP_direct-ask_100-day-deadline&additional\[utm_content\]=042917-100-day-mark-april-2017-eom-djt-jfc-p-p-hf-e-1&utm_source=e_p-p&amount=1)**

**Account Number:** 141645-2017

**100 DAY SUPPORTER: PENDING**

**100 Day Deadline:** TONIGHT April 29, 11:59 PM

[CONTRIBUTE $1](https://donate.donaldjtrump.com/100-day-deadline?utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=GOP_direct-ask_100-day-deadline&additional\[utm_content\]=042917-100-day-mark-april-2017-eom-djt-jfc-p-p-hf-e-1&utm_source=e_p-p&amount=1)

| | Peter,

I hate to be the bearer of bad news -- **we are coming up short on our grassroots fundraising goal for April.**

**[Outside groups spent more than $12 million attacking Joe in 2012. We need to be prepared for all that and more in 2018. Double your $5 contribution today by taking advantage of our matching program, and help us stay on track for victory.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c266d/7377f838/360b621b/51fb5605/4012459071/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-aprileom?refcode=20170429nd&amount=10")** | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c266d/7377f838/360b621b/51fb5605/4012459071/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-aprileom?refcode=20170429nd&amount=10")
---
I'm going to see Joe shortly, and I would like to be able to tell him some good news (seriously, I _hate_ to be the bearer of bad news).

We only have one day to turn these numbers around. That's ambitious -- but so is running for the Senate as a Democrat in a state like Indiana. Joe's already shown that he's got the guts and the know-how to win. Now, he needs to know we've got his back.

**[Make a contribution right now -- $5 if that's all you can spare -- and we'll match your gift.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c266d/7377f838/360b621b/51fb5605/4012459071/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-aprileom?refcode=20170429nd&amount=10")**

I want Joe to continue to focus on fighting for Indiana values. I want him to concentrate on strengthening Social Security and Medicare and safeguarding working Hoosier families from Republicans' pro-special interest agenda. But he can't do that if he's worrying about fundraising goals.

Give me a chance to tell him some good news. **[Make a $5 contribution before our deadline tomorrow.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c266d/7377f838/360b621b/51fb5605/4012459071/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-aprileom?refcode=20170429nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,

Kelly Norton
National Finance Director

name: Russ Feingold, LegitPAC
subject: Why we support candidates
body:
For these two reasons, I'm asking LegitPAC supporters to get behind two great candidates who are champions of legitimacy. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c4/1c469400/2c3c9dc/354913a/1211000725/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitpac_opg?refode=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr&source=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr") Friend, When we support candidates who will fight to restore our democratic legitimacy, it does two very important things: One, it increases the likelihood that we will elect those champion candidates to positions of power where they can directly help create a more legitimate government. And two, it sends a powerful signal to candidates that it's important to be on the right side of this issue. For those two reasons, I'm asking LegitPAC supporters to get behind three great candidates who are champions of legitimacy now, before April comes to an end. [_**Contribute $4 to Jon Ossoff in Georgia, Tom Perriello in Virginia, and Rob Quist in Montana today.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c4/1c469400/2c3c9dc/354913b/1211000725/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitpac_opg?refode=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+4+to+Jon+Ossoff+in+Georgia+To&utm_campaign=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr&source=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr") **Jon Ossoff** is running to fill a U.S. House seat in Georgia that was last held by a congressman who went to join President Trump's administration. Winning this seat would not only send a strong signal, but Ossoff also has strong positions on voting rights and dark money in elections. And he's investigated and exposed dozens of corrupt politicians and judges in his career. **Tom Perriello** has a record as a bold progressive and is in a tough primary to be the next governor of Virginia. He is steadfastly committed to policies that will restore electoral legitimacy, like ending partisan gerrymandering, strengthening voting rights, and enacting the national popular vote. Under his leadership, more Virginians will have the ability to participate meaningfully in elections. **Rob Quist** is a candidate for Congress in Montana, running to fill another seat last held by a Republican who joined the Trump administration. Quist is targeted by GOP dark money in a state where Democrats running statewide can win. Quist has taken a strong stand against Citizens United and wants to stand up to big corporations and billionaires who dominate and delegitimize our political process. With the end of the month coming up tomorrow, it's vital that we support Jon and Tom and Rob today to help reach their end-of-month financial goals. [_**Contribute $4 to Jon Ossoff and Tom Perriello and Rob Quist today to support these champions of legitimacy.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c4/1c469400/2c3c9dc/3549138/1211000725/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitpac_opg?refode=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Contribute+4+to+Jon+Ossoff+and+Tom+Perri&utm_campaign=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr&source=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr") These three candidates would be crucial champions for restoring integrity and legitimacy to our democracy. But supporting them also shows candidates around the country that it's important for them to be on the right side of these issues, too. Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy, Russ Feingold | [CONTRIBUTE](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c4/1c469400/2c3c9dc/3549139/1211000725/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitpac_opg?refode=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr&source=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c4/1c469400/2c3c9dc/3549136/1211000725/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=5+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr&source=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c4/1c469400/2c3c9dc/3549137/1211000725/VEsA/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr&source=20170429_r4w_OPG_fr"). | Authorized and paid for by LegitPAC

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: 100 thoughts on 100 days
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a552/3911313675/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com")
---
| Dear friends, In honor of Donald Trump's first 100 days in office, here are 100 things to remember about his presidency so far: **100.** Lying about the smaller size of his inauguration crowd
**99.** Making white nationalist Steve Bannon a key part of his leadership team
**98.** [Threatening](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a553/3911313675/VEsE/ "https://www.theguardian.com/environment/2017/apr/18/trump-paris-climate-agreement-climate-change") to pull out of the Paris agreement on climate change
**97. ** Sean Spicer making [errant and offensive comments](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a54c/3911313675/VEsF/ "https://www.nytimes.com/2017/04/11/us/politics/sean-spicer-hitler-gas-holocaust-center.html?_r=0") about the Holocaust
**96.** Going back on his word to name China a currency manipulator
**95.** Announcing the bombing of Syria over [chocolate cake](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a54d/3911313675/VEsC/ "https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2017/apr/12/trump-xi-jinping-chocolate-cake-syria-strikes") with the Chinese president
**94.** Threatening to break up the 9th Circuit Court of Appeals after it ruled against him
**93.** Hiring Gen. Michael Flynn as National Security Advisor [amid possibly illegal](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a54e/3911313675/VEsD/ "http://www.cnn.com/2017/04/27/politics/mike-flynn-donald-trump/") entanglements with foreign governments
**92.** Handling classified documents over open-air dinners at Mar-a-Lago
**91.** Golfing, golfing, golfing after consistently [criticizing](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a54f/3911313675/VEsA/ "http://www.chicagotribune.com/news/opinion/commentary/ct-donald-trump-golf-trips-20170424-story.html") President Obama for doing so
**90.** Outsourcing key policy initiatives to his inexperienced son-in-law
**89.** Directing administration officials away from using the term "climate change"
**88.** Attorney General Jeff Sessions lying to the Senate about pre-election communications with Russia
**87.** Likely racking up [more in travel and security costs](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a548/3911313675/VEsB/ "http://www.cnn.com/2017/04/10/politics/donald-trump-obama-travel-costs/") in one year than President Obama needed in 8 full years
**86.** Getting Neil Gorsuch on the Supreme Court after the Senate GOP blocked Obama's rightful nominee Merrick Garland in 2016
**85.** Installing Wall Street executives and lobbyists to key posts after promising to "drain the swamp"
**84.** Via Kellyanne Conway, allowing the phrase "alternative facts" to enter our discourse
**83.** [Declaring](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a549/3911313675/VEsO/ "https://www.nytimes.com/2017/02/17/business/trump-calls-the-news-media-the-enemy-of-the-people.html") the free press the enemy of the American people
**82.** Threatening the well-being of millions of Americans by holding healthcare subsidies [hostage](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a54a/3911313675/VEsP/ "http://nymag.com/daily/intelligencer/2017/04/trump-administration-may-be-holding-obamacare-hostage.html")
**81.** Introducing a budget that guts funding for PBS, scientific research, the EPA, education programs, and Planned Parenthood
**80.** Still refusing to release his taxes
**79.** In a [Fox interview](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a54b/3911313675/VEsHBQ/ "https://qz.com/962274/donald-trump-just-revealed-that-he-probably-doesnt-know-who-north-koreas-leader-kim-jong-un-is-in-a-fox-news-interview/"), apparently not knowing the difference between Kim Jong-il and Kim Jong-un
**78.** Claiming that he only lost the popular vote because of millions of fraudulent votes cast by illegal immigrants
**77.** Tweeting complaints about his daughter's clothing line being pulled from stores
**76. ** [Inventing](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a544/3911313675/VEsHBA/ "http://www.dailykos.com/story/2017/2/19/1635516/-Breaking-Survivors-of-Bowling-Green-Massacre-to-go-to-Sweden-in-Show-of-Support") fake terrorist attacks in Bowling Green, Atlanta, and "last night in Sweden"
**75.** White House advisor Stephen Miller [declaring](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a545/3911313675/VEsHBw/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/news/the-fix/wp/2017/02/13/stephen-millers-audacious-controversial-declaration-trumps-national-security-actions-will-not-be-questioned/") that President Trump's decisions "will not be questioned"
**74.** Continually claiming that Mexico will pay for a border wall while the Mexican government continually asserts it will not
**73.** [Weakening](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a546/3911313675/VEsHBg/ "http://www.politico.com/story/2017/01/trump-lobbying-ban-weakens-obama-ethics-rules-234318") President Obama's federal lobbying ban
**72.** Having one of [the least diverse](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a547/3911313675/VEsHAQ/ "http://www.nbcnews.com/storyline/inauguration-2017/trump-cabinet-breakdown-race-gender-n708986") cabinets in recent memory
**71.** Backtracking and flip-flopping on [his opposition](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a540/3911313675/VEsHAA/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/blogs/right-turn/wp/2017/04/27/nafta-another-stunt-another-hasty-retreat-for-trump/?utm_term=.7429e3b9c905") to NAFTA
**70.** Backtracking and flip-flopping on [his opposition](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a541/3911313675/VEsHAw/ "http://www.businessinsider.com/trump-nato-obsolete-2017-4") to NATO (because he didn't know "much" about it)
**69.** Reversing President Obama's practice of making the White House visitor's log public
**68.** Firing U.S. Attorney Preet Bharara after promising to keep him on
**67.** Failing to divest himself of business interests that present clear conflicts of interest
**66.** Introducing a tax plan that creates huge loopholes for pass-though companies, hedge funds...and likely Trump himself
**65.** "Nobody knew healthcare could be so complicated."
**64. ** Picking fights with longtime allies like [Germany](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a542/3911313675/VEsHAg/ "http://www.vanityfair.com/news/2017/03/angela-merkel-just-fact-shamed-donald-trump-about-the-one-thing-hes-supposed-to-know"), [Canada](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a543/3911313675/VEsHDQ/ "http://money.cnn.com/2017/04/25/news/economy/trump-canada-nafta/"), and [England](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a53c/3911313675/VEsHDA/ "https://www.thesun.co.uk/news/2979030/donald-trump-postpones-state-visit-to-britain-in-attempt-to-avoid-controversy-after-protests-and-mps-objections/")
**63.** [Supporting](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a53d/3911313675/VEsEBQ/ "http://www.cnn.com/2017/04/18/europe/turkey-referendum-trump-erdogan/") tainted election results in Turkey that give more power to its autocratic leader
**62.** Ordering a Navy SEAL raid that [gathered no](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a53e/3911313675/VEsEBA/ "http://www.businessinsider.com/yemen-raid-intelligence-2017-2") actionable intelligence
**61.** [Being unaware](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a53f/3911313675/VEsEBw/ "http://thediplomat.com/2017/04/the-us-didnt-send-that-carrier-group-to-the-korean-peninsula-but-did-north-korea-know-that/") if we were sending an "armada" to North Korea
**60 through 7:** Blank in recognition of Trump's 54 of 60 unfulfilled, stalled, or broken campaign promises, per the [Washington Post](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a538/3911313675/VEsEBg/ "http://www.washingtonpost.com/graphics/politics/trump-promise-tracker/"), many of which are on this list
**6.** Leaving dozens of vital national security positions empty at the State Department
**5.** Instituting an unconstitutional immigrant ban that makes our nation less safe
**4. ** House leaders [standing by](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e21/738133e4/3321acbc/7f85a539/3911313675/VEsEAQ/ "https://www.usatoday.com/videos/news/nation/2017/03/30/ryan-stands-nunes-trump-amid-russia-claims/99819128/") Intel Committee Chair Devin Nunes after he interfered with Congress's investigation into Russian election meddling
**3. ** Trying (and failing) to fully repeal Obamacare
**2. ** Fabricating claims out of thin air that President Obama wiretapped Trump Tower

name: Jay Inslee
subject: SIGN ON: No matter WHAT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
The West Coast will protect the environment at all costs.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTA5MTY5MzYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MjMwMTM3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) Dear Friend, The bad news: President Trump has been in office for 100 days, and he's only showing more resolve to damage our Earth. The good news: States are going to be the forces that stop him. While Donald Trump is trying to push the country backwards, state governments are joining together to move us forward. That's why Governor Kate Brown of Oregon and I are joining together to make sure the West Coast leads the national fight to combat climate change, no matter what the Trump administration tries to do. But this movement is going to take more than the two of us. Today, thousands of people are marching in every state across the country (including dozens of marches across Washington) to call for climate action. We're witnessing an outcry to take back our Earth from President Trump, and I want you to join it. [**On his 100th day in office, sign on to show Trump: We won 't stop fighting for the Earth, no matter what he does!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTA5MTY5MzYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MjMwMTM3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) We are prepared to stop the president's attacks on the environment at every turn. The West Coast is home to some of the most scientifically literate people and companies on earth. We must fight against Trump with everything we have to ensure we protect our climate and grow our economy. Anything else is unacceptable. That's why we need you to commit to showing up for this fight alongside Governor Brown and myself. No matter how long we have to work, no matter how many times the administration tries to take away our progress, we will fight back. [**While we 're marching, add your name today: Join the movement to protect our environment at all costs!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTA5MTY5MzYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MjMwMTM3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) Thank you. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA5MTY5MzYS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MjMwMTM3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Anne Holton
subject: prouder than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

One hundred days into Donald Trump's presidency, I'm prouder than ever of Tim. He's not afraid to stand up for what's right -- and against those who would harm our Commonwealth.

**Will you show Tim you 're proud of him, too? [If you're able, please make a donation to Team Kaine's April goal by midnight tomorrow.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=hX4jVD6u8n5CbH68lqFaIllBa2eGXpzq)**

Troubling times like these call for leadership like Tim's. You could say he's the opposite of impulsive and irrational President Trump. Every bill he sponsors and every statement he makes -- it's done with thoughtful precision. And when we're talking about protecting everything that makes Virginia a great place to live -- our natural treasures, our diverse population, our schools, and much more -- we need someone thoughtful representing us.

In 2012, Tim received over 50,000 grassroots donations in his Senate race against George Allen. He was very proud of that number.

**We need to top that level of grassroots support for the 2018 race.** In the last six years it's gotten significantly harder to win against special interests. National Republicans are already talking about who they'll put up to run against Tim, and the Koch brothers and their allies are sure to be close behind.

**If they have their way, Tim won 't be around after 2018 to stand up for Virginians in the Senate. [Will you pitch in before tomorrow's end-of-April deadline?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=QmBQ2tAbnxPsOYMl6JEmp1lBa2eGXpzq)**

Thank you,

Anne

body:

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: [RESIST] Our women aren't letting up.
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7fda/24c69fd9/ed5d59b2/18e20335/1627196306/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE440N_digital_email_20170429_100days_inact&source=WQEFE440N_digital_email_20170429_100days_inact")
---

Peter,

Today marks President Trump's 100th day in office.

And what a first 100 days it's been.

Trump kicked off his presidency by reinstating the global gag rule, which blocks federal funding for any international aid organization that even discusses abortion, let alone provides it. He tried to force Congress to pass "Trumpcare," which would have kicked tens of millions of women off health insurance and gutted maternity care. Then he appointed anti-choice judge Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court. And just recently, he signed a law opening the door for states to defund Planned Parenthood.

We need to be READY for whatever attack on women's rights comes next.

**[Donate $3 before midnight tomorrow to stand up to President Trump and support the pro-choice Democratic women holding him accountable at every turn.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7fda/24c69fd9/ed5d59b2/18e20336/1627196306/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170427_email_EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+before+midnight+tomorrow+to+sta&utm_campaign=WQEFE440N_digital_email_20170429_100days_inact&source=WQEFE440N_digital_email_20170429_100days_inact")**

The good news is that our women are showing no signs of letting up.

Rep. Stephanie Murphy, a first-term House member and first-generation American whose family escaped Vietnam after the fall of Saigon, has stood up to Trump's harmful refugee orders.

Sen. Elizabeth Warren refused to give up when silenced; she persisted and spoke out against Jeff Sessions' nomination to be attorney general.

And Rep. Maxine Waters has become a powerful face of the resistance by calling for an independent investigation into the Trump campaign's Russia ties.

Donald Trump may have made attacking women one of his top priorities during his first 100 days, but with women like these in Congress, we know that there will be a chorus of voices pushing back every. single. time.

**Donate $3 before midnight tomorrow to help meet our $150,000 End-of-Month fundraising goal and support the women standing up to the Trump administration:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/100-Days-Resistance](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7fda/24c69fd9/ed5d59b2/18e20337/1627196306/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170427_email_EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorg100DaysResistanc&utm_campaign=WQEFE440N_digital_email_20170429_100days_inact&source=WQEFE440N_digital_email_20170429_100days_inact")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Chief of Staff, EMILY's List

Hi there,
Donald Trump, Steve Bannon, and Sean Spicer have been in the White House for 100 days. So far they've:
* Tried to defund Planned Parenthood
* Rammed through an extreme Supreme Court nominee
* Ripped away Internet privacy
* Attempted to take access to affordable health care away from millions

The first 100 days have been hard, and we know that there are more challenges ahead. It won't be easy, but the best way to navigate this new administration is to make sure that we're in this together.
